creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->suspended

Mark as suspended.  From private correspondence with submitter, 
he is unable to test again, as the machine is now in production. 
He is, however, confident that the floppy drive itself is fully 
functional in the machine, and that the floppy disks were also OK. 

dmesg follows:
